text: There is considerable reason to think that the text of verses 7-11 has suffered from corruption in the manuscript. Verse 7 reads literally, ‘These, like Adam, have sinned; they have behaved treacherously towards me there’—the last word suggests that a place name should appear in the first half of the verse, possibly Adom (Jos. 3.16).
This verse is untranslatable in the Hebrew text as it stands, and the Latin version of it offers no grammatical construction.
Literally, ‘in the house of Israel’, perhaps a false reading for ‘in Bethel’.
Verse 11 remains wholly obscure; some think the latter part of it really belongs to chapter 7.
